description: Data files required by the txtrs-av plan (AV-first first cut). Single class (`all`). Departures from txtrs: source-backed inputs only, no current_term_vested_cashflow.csv yet (term-vested liability handled differently in this cut), no amort_layers.csv. Mortality files are placeholders pending the AV-first mortality build.

files.purpose: AV-sourced salary distribution by entry_age x yos x age_group
AV-sourced active headcount by entry_age x yos x age_group
Plan-wide salary growth schedule (yos x growth rate)
Current retiree distribution by entry age
New-entrant profile (entry age x start salary)
Withdrawal rates by yos x age group
Retirement rates by age x rate set
Early-retirement reduction table for grandfathered tier
Early-retirement reduction table for non-grandfathered tiers
Synthetic cashflow stream sizing the current term-vested AAL
